Bull case: SLV stabilizes and recovers toward MA50 by 2026-03-18 (1m=+8.11% bounce is encouraging), GLD continues all-time high trajectory, LMT benefits from continued European rearmament acceleration, and KLAC/TSM recover on tariff de-escalation rhetoric. Holding is the strictly dominant action on day 6 of a 7-day cadence with no emergency invalidations present. Tomorrow's 2026-03-18 rebalance window is the correct and pre-committed execution point for all pending evaluations.
